---
title: "clean_nobeldata"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: FALSE

library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(httr2)
library(httr)
library(tidycensus)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}

#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE

url <- "https://api.nobelprize.org/2.1/laureates"

laureate <- GET(url)   
laureate               

details <- content(laureate, "parsed")

```

```{r}

n <- length(details$laureates)

for (i in 1:n) {
   laur <- details$laureates[[i]]
   
  name[i] <- laur$knownName$en
  birth_year[i] <- laur$birth$year
  prize_year[i] <- laur[["nobelPrizes"]][[1]][["awardYear"]]
    category[i] <- laur$nobelPrizes[[1]]$category$en
    gender[i]   <- laur$gender
    prize_money[i] <- laur$nobelPrizes[[1]]$prizeAmount 
     country[i] <- if (!is.null(laur$birth$place$country$en)) {
    laur$birth$place$country$en
  } else {
    NA
  }
}

noble <- tibble(
  name = name,
  birth_year = parse_number(birth_year),
  category = category,
  prize_year = prize_year,
  amount = prize_money,
  Birth_country = country,
  gender = gender
)

noble
```
